name: app.R
content:
library(shiny) library(ggplot2) # --- 模型參數定義 --- params <- list( M1 = c(a = 23.39056, b = 0.8829529, c = 0.03853343, rmse = 2.071837), M2 = c(a = 20.53797, b = 0.9062328, c = 0.04326543, rmse = 2.077457), M3 = c(a = 17.92954, b = 0.8356846, c = 0.05957887, rmse = 2.149874), M4 = c(a = 17.73671, b = 0.8622023, c = 0.06059212, rmse = 2.133787), M5_base = c(a = 15.47368, b = 0.8604075, c = 0.06081242, rmse = 2.153899) ) # M5 的修正係數 (針對 a 參數) m5_offsets <- c( Secondary = 2.288401, Trees = 1.386954 , midtolerant = 0.05079958, intolerant = 0.943326 ) # --- 2. 使用者介面 (UI) --- ui <- fluidPage( title="Taiwan No.1", titlePanel("亞熱帶森林樹高預測工具 (Appendix)"), sidebarLayout( sidebarPanel( numericInput("dbh", "輸入胸徑 DBH (cm):", value = 20, min = 1, max = 150), selectInput("model", "選擇預測模型:", choices = c("M1: 基礎公式" = "M1", "M2: 隨機樣區" = "M2", "M3: 隨機物種" = "M3", "M4: 隨機巢狀層級" = "M4", "M5: 功能群公式" = "M5")), conditionalPanel( condition = "input.model == 'M5'", selectInput("forest", "森林類型:", choices = c("Primary", "Secondary Forest")), selectInput("lifeform", "生活型:", choices = c("shrub", "Trees")), selectInput("tolerance", "耐陰性:", choices = c("tolerant", "midtolerant", "intolerant")) ), actionButton("save_btn", "確定紀錄此筆數據", class = "btn-success"), actionButton("clear_btn", "清除所有紀錄", class = "btn-danger"), hr(), # [關鍵修改] 這裡不用 downloadButton，改用 uiOutput 動態生成純前端下載按鈕 uiOutput("download_ui"), hr(), helpText(HTML("1. 本工具基於 Weibull 公式: H = 1.3 + a * (1 - exp(-c * DBH^b))
2. 本工具資料發展 DBH 最大為 45 cm，超出此值誤差較大")) ), mainPanel( h3(textOutput("pred_h")), plotOutput("curve_plot"), hr(), h4("已紀錄的數據清單："), tableOutput("record_table") ) ) ) # --- 3. 後端邏輯 (Server) --- server <- function(input, output) { storage <- reactiveVal(data.frame( 序號 = integer(), 模型 = character(), 森林類型 = character(), 生活型 = character(), 耐陰性 = character(), DBH_cm = numeric(), 預測樹高_m = numeric(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE )) current_params <- reactive({ if (input$model == "M5") { a_val <- params$M5_base["a"] if (input$forest == "Secondary Forest") a_val <- a_val + m5_offsets["Secondary"] if (input$lifeform == "Trees") a_val <- a_val + m5_offsets["Trees"] if (input$tolerance == "midtolerant") a_val <- a_val + m5_offsets["midtolerant"] if (input$tolerance == "intolerant") a_val <- a_val + m5_offsets["intolerant"] return(c(a = as.numeric(a_val), b = as.numeric(params$M5_base["b"]), c = as.numeric(params$M5_base["c"]))) } else { return(params[[input$model]][1:3]) } }) pred_val <- reactive({ p <- current_params() 1.3 + p["a"] * (1 - exp(-p["c"] * (input$dbh ^ p["b"]))) }) output$pred_h <- renderText({ paste0("即時預測樹高: ", round(pred_val(), 2), " 公尺") }) observeEvent(input$save_btn, { new_entry <- data.frame( 序號 = nrow(storage()) + 1, 模型 = input$model, 森林類型 = if(input$model == "M5") input$forest else "-", 生活型 = if(input$model == "M5") input$lifeform else "-", 耐陰性 = if(input$model == "M5") input$tolerance else "-", DBH_cm = input$dbh, 預測樹高_m = round(pred_val(), 2), stringsAsFactors = FALSE ) storage(rbind(storage(), new_entry)) }) observeEvent(input$clear_btn, { storage(data.frame(序號 = integer(), 模型 = character(), 森林類型 = character(), 生活型 = character(), 耐陰性 = character(), DBH_cm = numeric(), 預測樹高_m = numeric())) }) output$record_table <- renderTable({ storage() }) # [關鍵修改] 專為 Shinylive 設計的「純前端 Data URI」下載邏輯 output$download_ui <- renderUI({ df <- storage() # 如果表格是空的，顯示不可點擊的灰色按鈕 if (nrow(df) == 0) { return(tags$button(class = "btn btn-secondary", disabled = NA, "匯出紀錄為 CSV (請先紀錄數據)")) } # 將 DataFrame 轉為 CSV 格式字串 tmp <- tempfile() write.csv(df, tmp, row.names = FALSE) csv_str <- paste(readLines(tmp, warn = FALSE), collapse = "\n") # 加入 UTF-8 BOM 解決 Excel 中文亂碼，並轉換為安全的 URL 編碼 encoded_csv <- URLencode(csv_str, reserved = TRUE) data_uri <- paste0("data:text/csv;charset=utf-8,%EF%BB%BF", encoded_csv) # 動態產生原生 HTML 的 標籤，強制瀏覽器直接下載 tags$a( href = data_uri, download = paste0("TreeH_data_", Sys.Date(), ".csv"), # 這裡設定您想要的檔名！ class = "btn btn-info", "匯出紀錄為 CSV" ) }) output$curve_plot <- renderPlot({ p <- current_params() dbh_seq <- seq(0, 50, length.out = 200) h_seq <- 1.3 + p["a"] * (1 - exp(-p["c"] * (dbh_seq ^ p["b"]))) df <- data.frame(DBH = dbh_seq, H = h_seq) ggplot(df, aes(x = DBH, y = H)) + geom_line(size = 1.2, color = "steelblue") + annotate("point", x = input$dbh, y = pred_val(), color = "red", size = 4) + labs(title = paste("Model -", input$model), x = "DBH (cm)", y = "Height (m)") + theme_minimal(base_size = 14) + ylim(0, 40) + xlim(0, 50) }) } shinyApp(ui, server)
